pricing_conclusion: Hurdle prices are derived from the decision-grade universal contract; they do not constitute a capital decision.
falsifiers: Next filing shows cash below $5M without matching liability release or equity raise.
DFS delayed beyond 2026, Greenland blocks Stage 2, or PEA assumptions fail economic viability test.
BMW offtake terminated or advance forfeited before Wolfsberg production milestone.
